reviews.review_msg: Very passionate and knowledgeable about the course. Just a lot of concepts, bones to memorize. Was a little hard to focus because he's extremely handsome, with a nice big butt; honestly I could not focus half the time; my grade definitely suffered cause of it. But overall good class.
Hilarious, adorable, and a great public speaker. Make sure to attend lectures and take notes.
He was very passionate about the subject matter. Made it worth taking. Archaeology is not my major or minor, I took it for the science credit and he made it completely painless.

Gives a very thorough overview of all the primates. Great lectures that really make you think. Dr. Galdikas obviously  wants students to learn and is always available to talk after class. Great stories and comparisons accompany in depth lectures. Cares about students doing well and makes very fair tests. Enjoyable class and inspirational proff.
i thought i would be really interested by this class but im in the middle of the semister and she is so boring that i am not interested in this field anymore. Exam: wayyyyy to difficult

Easy B grade if you put in the effort, very interesting lectures. Sheri is passionate about the course. Guest lectures are especially entertaining, and her lectures and expectations are extremely clear. Quizzes are okay. No surprises when it comes to tests. Would definitely recommend this class!

Okay- someone please tell Barry that some of us are not straight from high school. He spends way too much time babying the class- is off topic frequently, and takes his sweet time getting to the point. Positive note- he's fair- up front- and is helpful. Wish he would make the lectures more challenging or stimulating, minus the bad jokes.

Amanda was very nice and approachable however, her lectures were pointless as they were directly from the textbook. She needed to provide her opinion, examples, and just generally interest students in the topic instead of reading fast through the slides. Her online tutorials were pointless and it had too many assignments. Her tests were fair.
Ansley is good peoples. Warm and caring about students.
Funny and hella cool. I got of profs this term. Approachable. Take her if you can.
Pescitelli is good but sometimes not helpful. Super strict guidelines and didnt like my paper even though i put alot of effort in.
One of the best professors ever, cares about students and offers help at any time. Can't be more thankful for such a great and caring prof

I was worried about this class not crim major but Yercich is really kind & helpful. Easy to approach with questions. Straight forward assignments but you need to put in the work to pass. Assignments are midterm easy, presentation simple, paper doesnt seem to bad, final & Yercich offered an extra credit assignment after the midterm.
